situation: audit-2026-07-07-032 M-POST-002 finding: creds.js line 20-22 pgrep output used as /proc/${pid}/environ path without numeric validation. Non-numeric pid (corrupt pgrep output, unexpected text) would cause read of arbitrary /proc path or silent info leak.
action: Add /^\d+$/ regex guard on pid string before /proc path interpolation. Single-line fix at line 21 — if (pid) → if (pid && /^\d+$/.test(pid)). Derived from audit-2026-07-07-032 M-POST-002.
